items.title: NEXORA wins multi-cloud migration contract from a major Korean manufacturer
items.excerpt: Enterprise SI firm NEXORA announced on the 12th that it has won a multi-cloud transformation project spanning 13 affiliates of a leading Korean manufacturing group. The contract is valued at roughly KRW 23 billion and will run in phases through H1 2027.

items.title: Awarded "SI Company of the Year" at the 2026 Korea SW Industry Awards
items.excerpt: NEXORA received the grand prize in the SI Company of the Year category at the 2026 Korea SW Industry Awards. The jury cited "a next-generation SI model combining AI and cloud."

items.title: AWS Summit Seoul 2026 keynote: "The Future of Enterprise AI Infrastructure"
items.excerpt: CEO Sungho Park will present "The Future of Enterprise AI Infrastructure" in the AWS Summit Seoul 2026 keynote session, held at COEX from May 28–29.

items.title: NEXORA closes KRW 22B Series B — Southeast Asia expansion accelerates
items.excerpt: NEXORA closed a KRW 22 billion Series B round, securing footholds for its Southeast Asia expansion.
